summary: Validated backend APIs and mobile-first Expo web preview for unified Munker generator requirements; requested flows are passing.
action_items: No blocking defects found for this request; proceed to merge-ready validation by main agent if desired.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py is very large (embedded HTML/CSS/JS in one file), raising maintainability and review risk.
frontend/lib/api.ts relies on EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL only; platform guidance references EXPO_BACKEND_URL, so config key alignment should be reviewed.
No MOCKED API observed in this run.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_pytest render record via POST /api/renders during persistence regression.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested: https://hex-palette-render.preview.emergentagent.com at 375x667. Verified single visible unified Munker controls, hidden original Munker details, 5 presets, cool-dark-vibration auto-mapping + hidden control sync, auto animate default on, site-html proxy usage, iframe whole-page style injection overlays, hue-driven recalibration updates in injected iframe stylesheet, and /api/health /api/site-html /api/tonality-renderer availability.
rca_of_issue: Initial UI assertion failure was test-script logic (checking stage CSS var before triggering effective palette recalibration path), not product regression; corrected by asserting injected iframe style hue-rotate before/after hue update and re-render.
